## Summary

Describe the change and why it matters.

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Release/CI
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation

- [ ] `test -z "$(gofmt -l cmd internal)"`
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go build -o bin/shine ./cmd/shine`
- [ ] `npm run test:npm`
- [ ] `bin/shine --check README.md`

## Notes

Add screenshots, terminal output, or follow-up work if relevant.
